executives.name: Peter Dasler
executives.background: Mr. Dasler has over 40 years of experience in the mining and exploration industry. He has been a director and officer of several public companies and has extensive experience in the management of exploration projects.

executives.name: Cory Belyk
executives.background: Mr. Belyk is a professional geologist with over 30 years of experience in the mining industry, including 25 years with Cameco Corporation in various senior roles.

executives.name: Harry Chan
executives.background: Mr. Chan is a Chartered Professional Accountant with over 20 years of experience in financial management and reporting for public companies.

executives.name: Nathan Bridge
executives.background: Mr. Bridge is a professional geologist with experience in uranium exploration in the Athabasca Basin.

board_of_directors.name: Peter Dasler
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Dasler has over 40 years of experience in the mining and exploration industry.

board_of_directors.name: Cory Belyk
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Belyk is a professional geologist with over 30 years of experience.

board_of_directors.name: Ambassador Thomas Graham, Jr.
board_of_directors.background: Ambassador Graham is a world-renowned expert on nuclear non-proliferation and has served under four US Presidents.

board_of_directors.name: Karl Schimann
board_of_directors.background: Dr. Schimann is a professional geologist with over 40 years of experience, including significant work on the Cigar Lake uranium deposit.

board_of_directors.name: Jean Luc Roy
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Roy has over 30 years of experience in the mining industry, primarily in Africa.

board_of_directors.name: Geoffrey Gay
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Gay is the CEO of Athabasca Basin Development, an investment company owned by the seven communities in Northern Saskatchewan's Athabasca Basin.
